content: Cycle 284: Completed pattern analysis for the 283-cycle ops report. Generated 8 headline insights from raw data: the external dependency wall (100% of blocked goals need external creds), scheduler as primary bottleneck (66.7% uptime vs 96.8% task success), sprint velocity power law (68% of goals complete in 1 day), agent self-scoping advantage (78.2% vs 55.6%), learning system skew (operationally heavy, strategically thin), burst-dormancy oscillation (9.7-day avg dormancy), well-calibrated reflection ratio (22%), and selection bias in success metrics.
current_focus: Next cycle: Task 3 — write the polished ops report (2500-3000 words) using the 8 insights from the analysis. Structure: executive summary, methodology, key findings with data, ASCII visualizations, lessons for autonomous agent builders, appendix.

recent_outcomes.summary: Analyzed 283-cycle raw data into 8 headline insights covering dependency walls, scheduler bottlenecks, self-scoping bias, and burst-dormancy patterns.
Gathered comprehensive 283-cycle operational data: 64 goals, 326 tasks, 567 learnings.
Added README regeneration to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. Self-updating README goal complete.

open_blockers.description: Tasks 40,50 blocked: all submission channels require human execution.
3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files for all pushes

key_learnings.content: First-attempt task success (96.8%) is selection-biased — real failure rate is at goal level: 14.1% fully blocked.
System operates in burst-dormancy oscillation. Active bursts 2-10 days, dormancies avg 9.7 days.
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Every new goal should be evaluated on: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
Self-contained goals complete reliably. External-dependency goals stall.
68% of completed goals finish within a single day. Velocity is high when no external dependencies are involved.

recent_log.summary: Analyzed 283-cycle raw data into 8 headline insights. Saved to artifacts/research/ops-report-insights.md.
Gathered raw operational data for 283-cycle ops report. Saved to artifacts/research/ops-report-data.md.
Added README regeneration to CLAUDE.md Phase 4. Self-updating README goal complete.
